snp2.11:1.2: do you not despise the wise man?
snp2.11:1.3: Is the one who holds up the torch for human beings
snp2.11:2.2: I don’t despise the wise man.
snp2.11:2.3: The one who holds up the torch for human beings
snp2.11:3.3: going forth from home through conviction,
snp2.11:3.4: be one who puts an end to suffering & stress.
snp2.11:5.4: Don’t be one who returns to the world.
snp2.11:6.3: have mindfulness immersed in the body,
snp2.11:7.3: Develop the mind in the unattractive—
snp2.11:8.3: Then, from having broken through conceit,
snp2.11:9.1: In this way, the Blessed One often instructed Ven. Rāhula with these verses.
